title: cephaelis cardiochlamys
intro: Cephaelis cardiochlamys, also known as the Yellow Root or Cardiachlamys, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Cephaelis cardiochlamys is often combined with other herbs and roots to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat various ailments.
